# Twinkle / Lumine

Use the Lumine CLI for terminal-based help with Twinkle Build apps.

Install-free commands:

```bash
npx @stage5/lumine@latest login
npx @stage5/lumine@latest check <twinkle-build-url>
npx @stage5/lumine@latest launch <twinkle-build-url>
```

The CLI accepts Twinkle app, build, and preview URLs, resolves the build id,
runs server-side launch checks, publishes through Twinkle's API, and verifies
the production URL.

Authentication uses Twinkle's device-code approval flow. The user approves
access at `https://www.twin-kle.com/cli`; the CLI stores a scoped local token
for build launch actions.
